---
title: "Software & Resources"
description: "Verified public software and educational resources from the OPTOLAB-UNIMORE GitHub organization."
canonical-url: "https://optolab-unimore.github.io/software.html"
---

The following cards are based only on public repository descriptions and README files retrieved from the [OPTOLAB-UNIMORE GitHub organization](https://github.com/OPTOLAB-UNIMORE).

::: {.resource-grid}
::: {.resource-card}
<span class="resource-type">Calibration · research code</span>

## Calibration Method for Multi-Channel Sensor

Repository intended to contain code related to work on flexible calibration methods for low-cost photometric and radiometric measurements.

[Open repository →](https://github.com/OPTOLAB-UNIMORE/Calibration-Method-for-Multi-Channel-Sensor)
:::

::: {.resource-card}
<span class="resource-type">Imaging · educational software</span>

## ESP32-S3 Camera GUI

Educational PySide6 GUI and ESP32-S3 firmware for Wi-Fi camera streaming, TCP control and high-resolution snapshot capture.

[Open repository →](https://github.com/OPTOLAB-UNIMORE/esp32-s3-camera-gui)
:::

::: {.resource-card}
<span class="resource-type">Acquisition · educational software</span>

## Educational Serial Monitor GUI

Educational PySide6 desktop GUI for serial device control, live analog signal plotting, peak detection, data inspection and Arduino/ESP32 firmware examples.

[Open repository →](https://github.com/OPTOLAB-UNIMORE/educational-serial-monitor-gui)
:::
:::

## Responsible reuse

Each repository is the authoritative source for its requirements, setup instructions and current status. Review its README and license information before reuse.
